title: PubMed-OA-Extraction-dataset
author: Jiasheng Sheng
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the train-test-validation dataset for pubmed open-access articles keyphrase extraction task. The small_* file contains the all articles that have 5to 25 extractive keyphrases (keyphrase in the article that is inside the abstract of the article).
steps_raw: This is the train-test-validation dataset for pubmed open-access articles keyphrase extraction task. The small_* file contains the all articles that have 5to 25 extractive keyphrases (keyphrase in the article that is inside the abstract of the article).
